name: Tein, Inc.
summary: Tein, Inc. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells auto parts and suspensions in Japan and internationally. The company offers OE-shape shock absorbers, electronic damping force controllers, low-down springs, and specialized dampers, as well as shock absorbers for the street and sporty rides. It also provides standardized and racing springs, polyurethane bushes, strengthened tie rods, toe control arms, pillow ball upper mounts, bonnet/hood dampers, repair and replacement parts, and tools and handy products. In addition, the company offers helmets and intercoms, safety fuel cells, alignment and corner weight gauges, motorsport tents, gas cylinder covers, and automatic piston rod inspection machines. Further, the company sells imported automobile goods. Tein, Inc. was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.
